title: astragalus tecti-mundi
intro: Astragalus tecti-mundi, also known as Mongolian milkvetch, is a plant species within the legume family that is native to China and Mongolia. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus tecti-mundi are attributed to its ability to enhance the immune system, reduce fatigue, and improve cardiovascular health. Astragalus tecti-mundi is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, capsules, and tinctures, and is also used to make Astragalus extract, which is available in various forms for medicinal purposes.
